mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE NICKNAME = #{nickname}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM USER_WATCHLIST WHERE USER_ID = #{param1} AND ITEM_ID = #{param2}
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, EMAIL, PASSWORD, NAME, NICKNAME, PHONE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DETAIL, RESIDENT_NO, EMAIL_VERIFIED, EMAIL_VERIFY_TOKEN, LOGIN_FAIL_CNT, ACCOUNT_LOCKED, CREATED_AT FROM USERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS ( EMAIL, PASSWORD, NAME, NICKNAME, PHONE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DETAIL, RESIDENT_NO, EMAIL_VERIFIED, EMAIL_VERIFY_TOKEN, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{residentNo}, 'N', #{emailVerifyToken}, NOW() )
INSERT INTO USER_WATCHLIST (USER_ID, ITEM_ID, ADDED_AT) VALUES (#{param1}, #{param2}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET ACCOUNT_LOCKED = 'Y' WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT W.USER_ID FROM USER_WATCHLIST W JOIN STOCK_ITEM I ON W.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID WHERE I.TICKER = #{param1}
SELECT ITEM_ID FROM USER_WATCHLIST WHERE USER_ID = #{param1}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET LOGIN_FAIL_CNT = LOGIN_FAIL_CNT + 1, ACCOUNT_LOCKED = CASE WHEN LOGIN_FAIL_CNT + 1 >= 5 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
UPDATE USERS SET NICKNAME = #{nickname} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET PASSWORD = #{password} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT profile_image_url FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET profile_image_url = #{imageUrl} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
